title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF JONES, PROVINCE OF ROMBLON, TO MUNICIPALITY OF BANTON.

chunks.text:
H. No. 804 / 55 OG No. 22, 4013 (June 1, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2158, April 24, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF JONES, PROVINCE OF ROMBLON, TO MUNICIPALITY OF BANTON.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Jones, Province of Romblon, is changed to Municipality of Banton.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 24, 1959.
